name: Idealista Spain and Southern Europe Real Estate API
what_it_does: Idealista Spain and Southern Europe real estate platform REST API for real estate agencies, developers, and PropTech companies to syndicate property listings, access housing market data, manage buyer enquiries, and analyze the Spain, Italy, and Portugal property markets — the largest property portal in Spain and Italy with 80M+ monthly visits. Enables AI agents to manage property listing for Spanish real estate syndication automation, handle listing update for property status management automation, access property search for Spanish buyer and renter discovery automation, retrieve market analytics for Southern European price trend automation, manage enquiry lead for agency CRM automation, handle neighborhood data for Spanish location intelligence automation, access mortgage estimation for Spanish financing automation, retrieve commercial property for business real estate automation, manage new development for off-plan project automation, and integrate Idealista with CRM and Spanish property management platforms for end-to-end Southern European property automation.
use_cases: Syndicating property listings to Idealista for Spanish estate agency marketing automation agents
Accessing Spanish real estate market data and price indices for investment research automation agents
Managing buyer and renter enquiry leads from Idealista for Spanish estate agency CRM automation agents
Publishing new development project listings for Spanish and Italian property developer automation agents
not_for: Non-Iberian/Southern European markets (Idealista covers Spain, Italy, Portugal only)
Transaction processing (Idealista is marketing portal, not property transaction engine)
Large-scale data extraction without agreement (Idealista data is proprietary, not for scraping)
best_when: A Spanish or Italian estate agency, property developer, or Southern European PropTech platform wanting AI agents to syndicate listings, manage leads, and access property market intelligence through Idealista's dominant Spanish and Italian real estate portal.
avoid_when: AGENCY SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED: Idealista API requires active real estate agency subscription on Idealista; automated self-service developer access creates membership required step. SPANISH-LANGUAGE DOCUMENTATION: Idealista developer documentation is primarily in Spanish; automated non-Spanish team integration requires translation. GDPR COMPLIANCE FOR LEADS: European property enquiry data is personal data under GDPR; automated lead processing without consent creates data protection violation; automated must implement GDPR-compliant lead handling. XML FEED FOR LISTING UPLOAD: Idealista uses XML feed format for property listing syndication; automated JSON REST body assumption creates format rejection; automated must implement Idealista XML feed format for listing updates.

auth.notes: Idealista uses OAuth 2.0 for agency and developer API authentication. REST API + XML feeds. Madrid, Spain HQ. Founded 2000 by Fernando Encinar and Jesus Encinar. Backed by Apax Partners ($1.5B valuation). Products: Residential sales/rental, commercial, new development, land, garages. SDKs: None public. 80M+ monthly visits. Operates in ES (primary), IT (immobiliare.it affiliate), PT. Spanish and Italian market leader. GDPR. Competes with Fotocasa in Spain, Immobiliare.it in Italy.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API test environment for registered agencies; production requires Idealista agency subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Agency subscription: monthly fee based on listing volume and tier; enterprise pricing for portals
pricing.notes: Madrid ES. Apax Partners. Agency subscription. Spanish docs. GDPR. Spain/Italy/Portugal.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; search and listing APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: XML FEED FORMAT REQUIRED: Idealista listing syndication uses XML feed format; automated JSON REST payload assumption creates format_not_supported error; automated must generate Idealista-format XML for property listing uploads

AGENCY SUBSCRIPTION PREREQUISITE: Idealista API requires active agency subscription; automated developer self-service creates membership_required; automated must complete agency subscription before API credentials
SPANISH-LANGUAGE DOCUMENTATION: Idealista developer docs are primarily in Spanish; automated non-Spanish team integration requires translation; automated error messages may also be in Spanish

GDPR CONSENT FOR LEAD DATA: European property lead data requires GDPR consent management; automated lead storage without consent creates data protection violation; automated must implement explicit consent records for property enquiry data

NO WEBHOOKS FOR LEADS: Idealista does not provide webhooks for new enquiry notifications; automated webhook lead notification assumption creates missed leads; automated must implement polling-based lead retrieval from Idealista dashboard
agent_readiness.security_notes: Spain/Italy property portal. GDPR, LSSICE-ES. OAuth2. EU/ES. Property listing and lead data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Southern Europe property portal. GDPR. OAuth2. EU/ES. Property and customer lead data.
